div1.entryFree:
Tenderly, 1) softly, gently: t. apply to her some remedies for life, Wint. III, 2, 153. O, good sir, t., O! IV, 3, 74. will as t. be led by the nose as asses are, Oth. I, 3, 407.
2) kindly, fondly: so t. officious to save this bastard's life, Wint. II, 3, 159. my stooping duty t. shall show, R2 III, 3, 48. that so t. and entirely loves him, Lr. I, 2, 104.
